# andrej-karpathy-skills

Karpathy-inspired Claude Code guidelines - 4 principles for better LLM coding: Think Before Coding, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution

## Installation

```bash
/plugin install andrej-karpathy-skills@karpathy-skills
```

```bash
curl -o CLAUDE.md https://raw.githubusercontent.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills/main/CLAUDE.md
```

## Commands

- `/plugin marketplace add forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills`
- `/plugin install andrej-karpathy-skills@karpathy-skills`
- `curl -o CLAUDE.md https://raw.githubusercontent.com/forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills/main/CLAUDE.md`

## Usage Examples

- Add to Claude Code via plugin marketplace
- Include CLAUDE.md in project root for per-project guidelines
